headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Motorola Solutions with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $540
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Niknam   initiates coverage on Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $540.
